title: neomammillaria missouriensis
intro: Neomammillaria missouriensis, also known as the Missouri ball cactus or Missouri pincushion cactus, is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria missouriensis include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
